name: telegram
description: Telegram connector using Telegraf — bridges Telegram bot messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to interact

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Telegram group IDs to process messages from
